texto: What you knew in your childhood is true; the Otherworld of magic and enchantment is real, sometimes terribly real - and certainly more real than the factual reality which our culture has built up, brick by brick, to shut out colour and light and prevent us from flying.
explicacao: Citação de Patrick Harpur sobre passagem do tempo e prioridades. “What you knew in your childhood is true; the Otherworld of magic and enchantment is real, sometim…” articula familia, childhood, magic em registro de familia, com relevância para contextos como magic e otherworld.
